candidateRanking.lane: MissionScript Vector/Range Command-Effect Deterministic Helper Fixture Proof Plan
candidateRanking.rationale: Safest new non-runtime implementation-facing fixture: pure static/math helper behavior, five finite handlers, deterministic vector/component/range semantics, zero direct non-comment loose-MSL rows, and no copied-save, UI, private-frame, patch, Godot, or runtime dependency.

candidateRanking.lane: MissionScript Goodie State / Save Command-Effect Fixture Proof Plan
candidateRanking.rationale: Useful save-adjacent family, but it risks Goodies wall, save/load, and AddScore alias-boundary overclaiming before the pure helper lane is exhausted.

candidateRanking.lane: MissionScript Cutscene Pan-Camera / Position Fixture Proof Plan
candidateRanking.rationale: Useful later, but it couples quickly to camera switching, GetThingRef("Fenrir"), visible output, cutscene playback, and runtime object identity.

candidateRanking.lane: PhysicsScript Parser/Rebuild Contract Extension Proof Plan
candidateRanking.rationale: Valuable parser work, but lower immediate value than advancing the already-ranked MissionScript command-effect fixture queue with a pure helper lane.

futureEvidenceRequirements.requirement: Preserve raw descriptor rows as context only, especially placeholder or conflicting observed name symbols.

futureEvidenceRequirements.requirement: Stop if the proof needs live MissionScript execution, BEA launch, frame review, private output, native input, debugger attachment, Godot, Ghidra mutation, executable patching, or rebuild implementation.
